title: tridens muticus var. elongatus
intro: Tridens muticus var. elongatus, also known as the 'Long Spike Tridens', is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The Long Spike Tridens is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
